description: Portable artifact lanes that Moondesk can export and Moontown can consume without turning the town viewport into a single-agent IDE.

artifacts.title: MoonBook Workspace Pack
artifacts.scope: single book authored in Moondesk, supervised in Moontown
artifacts.summary: Durable wiki, generated pages, evidence folders, and review queues prepared in Moondesk and bound to a Moontown civic module through book_id.
import_contract: book folder contains moonbook-ui-state.json or can regenerate it
book_id is stable and matches one configured town module
generated output paths stay under the book folder

artifacts.title: Town Module Pack
artifacts.summary: A portable set of civic buildings, coordinates, entrances, MoonBook bindings, and summaries that Moontown can merge into the module registry.
import_contract: modules have stable ids and book_id bindings
coordinates pass terrain and collision validation
disabled modules remain in config but do not render

artifacts.title: Tilemap Asset Pack
artifacts.summary: Transparent building, roof, actor, and prop sprites produced or curated in Moondesk and referenced by module config.
import_contract: sprites use transparent backgrounds
asset paths are relative to the Rabbita public asset root
large sprites include footprint metadata

artifacts.title: Agent Profile Pack
artifacts.scope: simple worker lane controls in Moontown, detailed authoring in Moondesk
artifacts.summary: Role, capacity, cadence, permission envelope, visible home building, and book/module assignment. Detailed prompts and memory rules remain in Moondesk/MoonBook skill files.
import_contract: profile declares role, capacity, and permission envelope
profile binds to a module id or book_id
profile does not include unrestricted raw tool access

artifacts.title: Skill Pack Reference
artifacts.summary: Reusable prompts, output contracts, review rubrics, and examples. Moontown only references the pack when assigning work; it does not edit the skill body.
import_contract: skill has SKILL.md with examples and output contracts
skill owner is MoonBook or MoonClaw, not Moontown
town module references the skill by id

artifacts.title: Operator Request Pack
artifacts.scope: human request staged in Moondesk, dispatched by Moontown mayor
artifacts.summary: Context-rich request drafted in Moondesk and submitted to Moontown as a standing watch or one-shot mayor goal.
import_contract: request declares target_book_id
request declares cadence and quality threshold
Moontown mayor performs scheduling and dispatch

artifacts.title: Generated Output Bundle
artifacts.target_path: Moontown final output mode and Moondesk file browser
artifacts.summary: Published sites, reports, evidence pages, and pending reviews. Moontown shows the high-level output surface; Moondesk remains the detailed file browser.
import_contract: bundle is under a MoonBook book folder
moonbook-ui-state.json points to important outputs
review-required outputs are labeled before public presentation
